meta.title: Tadzuna — Take the reins of AI
meta.description: Custom AI that puts your business ahead — built around your data, owned and run by you. Tadzuna designs and ships enterprise AI systems on infrastructure you own.

home.tagline: Take the reins of AI. Pull ahead.
home.intro: Custom AI that puts your business ahead — built around your data, owned and run by you.
home.beliefTitle: AI built for your business — not rented from someone else's cloud.
home.beliefBody: We design and build AI around your data, your stack, and your goals — then ship it all the way to production on infrastructure you own. Not a rented API. Not slideware. Systems that are truly yours.

custom.title: Built around you
custom.body: Tailored to your data, workflows, and constraints — not a one-size-fits-all API.

owned.title: Owned, not rented
owned.body: Deployed on infrastructure you own. Your models, your data — no lock-in, no meter.

delivered.title: Shipped to production
delivered.body: From prototype to production, we deliver working systems — backed by the chops to build the hardware too.

estimate.title: How much VRAM do I need?
estimate.description: Estimates based on 4-bit quantization, 8K context, single-user, NVIDIA GPU.
estimate.disclaimer: Based on 4-bit quantization, 8K context, single-user, NVIDIA GPU.

compatibility.title: Can this model run on my GPU?
compatibility.disclaimer: Based on 4-bit quantization, 8K context, single-user, NVIDIA GPU.
